hooks.command:
CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_command"
BLOCKED=0
REASON=""

# Commandes destructives interdites
if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf|DROP\s+TABLE|TRUNCATE\s+TABLE|curl\s+.*\|\s*bash|curl\s+.*\|\s*sh|git\s+reset\s+--hard'; then
  BLOCKED=1; REASON="commande destructive"
fi

# Force-push interdit sans --force-with-lease ; jamais vers main/master
if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+push' ; then
  if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(--force([^-]|$)|\s-f(\s|$))' && ! echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'force-with-lease'; then
    BLOCKED=1; REASON="force-push sans --force-with-lease"
  fi
  if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+push\s+[^ ]+\s+(main|master)(\s|$|:)'; then
    BLOCKED=1; REASON="push direct vers main/master — passe par /create-pr"
  fi
fi

# Lecture de fichiers de secrets via shell interdite (.env.example/.sample/.template tolérés)
if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(^|[|&; ])(cat|bat|less|more|head|tail|nl|xxd|od|strings|grep|rg|ack|awk|sed)([[:space:]]|$)'; then
  if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '\.env([^.[:alnum:]]|$|\.(local|production|prod|development|dev|staging|test))'; then BLOCKED=1; REASON="lecture de secrets"; fi
  if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(\.pem|\.key|id_rsa|id_ed25519|\.p12|\.pfx|\.npmrc|\.netrc|secrets\.[a-z]+)([^.[:alnum:]]|$)'; then BLOCKED=1; REASON="lecture de secrets"; fi
fi

if [ "$BLOCKED" = "1" ]; then
  echo "BLOQUÉ ($REASON) : $CMD" >&2
  exit 2
fi

FILE="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_path}"
if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi
BASE=$(basename "$FILE")
case "$BASE" in
  .env.example|.env.sample|.env.template|.env.dist) exit 0 ;;
esac
case "$BASE" in
  .env|.env.*|*.pem|*.key|id_rsa|id_dsa|id_ecdsa|id_ed25519|*.p12|*.pfx|secrets.*|.npmrc|.netrc)
    echo "BLOQUÉ : lecture de fichier de secrets interdite — $FILE (utiliser .env.example)" >&2
    exit 2
    ;;
esac

FILE="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_path}"
if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi
BASE=$(basename "$FILE")
case "$BASE" in
  .env|.env.*)
    case "$BASE" in .env.example|.env.sample|.env.template|.env.dist) exit 0 ;; esac
    echo "BLOQUÉ : écriture sur fichier .env interdite — $FILE" >&2
    exit 2
    ;;
  package-lock.json|pnpm-lock.yaml|yarn.lock)
    echo "BLOQUÉ : écriture sur lockfile interdite — modifier via le package manager uniquement" >&2
    exit 2
    ;;
esac
case "$FILE" in
  */.git/*|.git/*)
    echo "BLOQUÉ : écriture dans .git interdite — $FILE" >&2
    exit 2
    ;;
  */node_modules/*|node_modules/*)
    echo "BLOQUÉ : écriture dans node_modules interdite — $FILE" >&2
    exit 2
    ;;
esac

FILE="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_path}"
if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi
case "$FILE" in
  *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.css|*.md)
    ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)
    if [ -n "$ROOT" ] && [ -f "$ROOT/node_modules/.bin/prettier" ]; then
      npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
    fi
    ;;
esac

BACKUP_DIR="$HOME/.claude/backups"
mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"
TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
PROJECT=$(basename "$ROOT")
FILE="$BACKUP_DIR/${PROJECT}_${TIMESTAMP}.md"

echo "# Compact backup — $PROJECT — $TIMESTAMP" > "$FILE"
echo "" >> "$FILE"
echo "## Git status" >> "$FILE"
git -C "$ROOT" status --short 2>/dev/null >> "$FILE" || echo "(no git)" >> "$FILE"
echo "" >> "$FILE"
echo "## PLAN.md" >> "$FILE"
cat "$ROOT/PLAN.md" 2>/dev/null >> "$FILE" || echo "(no PLAN.md)" >> "$FILE"

# Garder seulement les 20 derniers backups
ls -t "$BACKUP_DIR"/${PROJECT}_*.md 2>/dev/null | tail -n +21 | xargs rm -f 2>/dev/null || true

ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)
if [ -z "$ROOT" ]; then exit 0; fi

echo "=== SESSION START ==="
echo ""
echo "## Git status"
git -C "$ROOT" status --short 2>/dev/null || echo "(no changes)"
echo ""
echo "## PLAN.md"
cat "$ROOT/PLAN.md" 2>/dev/null || echo "(aucun plan en cours)"
echo "================="
notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Attend ton input' 2>/dev/null || osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code attend ton input" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || true
